name: ls
description: List directory contents.

name: cd
description: Change the current working directory.

name: pwd
description: Print the absolute path of the current working directory.

name: mkdir
description: Create new directories.

name: rm
description: Remove files or directories recursively.

name: cp
description: Copy files and directories.

name: mv
description: Move or rename files and directories.

name: find
description: Search for files in a directory hierarchy based on name, size, type, etc.

name: chmod
description: Change the read, write, and execute permissions of files and directories.

name: chown
description: Change the user and/or group ownership of files and directories.

name: ps
description: Report a snapshot of the current active processes.

name: top
description: Display dynamic, real-time view of running system processes and CPU/RAM usage.

name: htop
description: Interactive and visually enhanced command-line process viewer.

name: kill
description: Send a signal to terminate a process by its Process ID (PID).

name: curl
description: Transfer data from or to a server using supported network protocols (HTTP, HTTPS, etc.).

name: wget
description: Non-interactive network downloader to retrieve files from servers.

name: ping
description: Send ICMP ECHO_REQUEST packets to verify network connectivity to a host.

name: netstat
description: Print network connections, routing tables, and interface statistics.

name: ip
description: Show / manipulate routing, network devices, interfaces, and tunnels.

name: grep
description: Search text for lines matching a regular expression or string query.

name: awk
description: Pattern scanning and processing language, highly useful for columns and logs manipulation.

name: sed
description: Stream editor for filtering and transforming text dynamically.

name: cat
description: Concatenate and display the content of files.

name: less
description: View file content or command output interactively, allowing forward and backward navigation.

name: uname
description: Print detailed system information about the operating system and kernel.

name: df
description: Show the amount of disk space available on file systems.

name: du
description: Estimate file and directory space usage.

name: free
description: Display the amount of free and used physical memory (RAM) and swap space.

name: tar
description: Archive utility used to combine multiple files into a single tarball, or compress them.

name: zip
description: Package and compress (archive) files.

name: unzip
description: Extract compressed files from a ZIP archive.

name: git clone
description: Clone a repository into a new directory.

name: git status
description: Show the working tree status, showing staged, unstaged, and untracked files.

name: git commit
description: Record changes to the repository by creating a new commit snapshot.

name: git push
description: Update remote references using local refs, uploading commits to the remote repo.
